human-review.evidence: Delegated autonomous drive (Kevin, 2026-07-01). Reviewed: 22-REQ spec through three sanctioned loopbacks (pre-gate revision, test-defect fixtures, review-driven spec rewrite of the displayed model + FINDING-035 third host), SCHEMA_VERSION 7->8 migration, two new read-only IPC surfaces, 103 TESTs, 37-finding ledger (30 resolved/merged; 7 open documented residuals incl. FINDING-036/037 inherited by F10/backlog), CONV-022..031 promoted. Suite 1249 green; build green.

escalations.reason: Seven-lens review: 8 distinct blocking contract violations on a green 1229-test implementation. Deepest root cause is spec-level (FINDING-013: REQ-010's 'displayed' built on the false premise that workspace switches unmount panes — they stay mounted hidden). Blockers: 013 (background-workspace fetching), 020 (restore/re-bind fetch counts, merged from 3 lenses), 023 (picker Enter-on-Cancel commits a pane), 024 (REQ-009 display set incomplete), 025 (theme-dead status var), 028 (stat-failure classified as absence), 029 (re-bind renders stale root's detail). Spec-origin non-blockers to fold in: 021 (wire lacks unique slug), 027 (compass loading copy), 031 (follow-up fires while hidden), 032 (template path bypasses coercion). Human decision on the loopback.
escalations.decision: Loop back to spec (delegated-human decision, autonomous drive authorization). Spec-writer amends: (1) REQ-010 redefine 'displayed' against the REAL mount model — a pane is displayed iff its tile is in its window's ACTIVE workspace's visible mosaic and not minimized (background workspaces stay mounted hidden; FINDING-013) — and pin the follow-up-fetch x hidden/unbound transition matrix (FINDING-031); keep the restore/re-bind fetch-count acceptance (zero non-stale / exactly one stale or re-bind) but ground it in remount reality (FINDING-020); (2) REQ-007/wire: detail features carry the unique dir slug; rows/disclosure key on it (FINDING-021); (3) REQ-020: binding coercion MUST cover every instantiation path incl. templates (FINDING-032, promote its CONV proposal); (4) decision #4c compass copy distinguishes loading from empty (FINDING-027); (5) REQ-008 notes 033's accepted cross-file staleness class. Then tests loopback pins everything that slipped the node-env harness: background-workspace non-fetch, component-level fetch counts, the picker's FULL keyboard matrix (Enter on Cancel/option in every state — the F6 class again), gate-at + stall rendering, a generalized theme-var-validity scan (every var(--x) referenced must be defined somewhere — new guard class), stat-failure surfacing, re-bind detail clearing + root guard, settle-while-hidden suppression. Then implementer fixes 013/020/023/024/025/026/028/029/031/032 + cheap non-blockers (011 leaf lstat, 018 shared memberSpelling helper, 019 reuse extraction where cheap); 012/014/015/016/033 may ride as documented residuals if their fixes prove non-trivial.

implementer.reason: Loopback fix cycle; same audited single-implementer degrade (codex worktree env failure; determinism lens + frozen vectors compensate).
